title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to the Tenant to Account with pending invite
scenario: Tenant info persists incorrectly in Support > App when switching from a tenant-linked account to an account with a pending invite
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and log in with an account that is linked to Tenant A.
2. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
3. Observe that Tenant A info (tenant name and ID) is displayed on the card.
4. Log out of the current account.
5. Log in with a different account that has a pending invite but is not yet linked to any tenant.
6. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
7. Observe the tenant info on the card.
expected: For the account linked to Tenant A, the tenant name and ID should be present on the Support → App card. For the account with a pending invite (not yet linked to any tenant), the tenant name and ID should NOT be present on the card.
